ddls:
CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage instructions */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the medication expires */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* List of possible side effects */,
  "contraindications" TEXT /* List of contraindications for the medication */,
  "prescription_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if a prescription is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medication in the package */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer of the package */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of medication in the package */,
  "free_quantity" INTEGER /* Number of free pills included in the package */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage for subsequent orders */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the package expires */,
  "lot_number" TEXT /* Unique lot number for the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being priced */,
  "price_per_pill" REAL /* Price per pill */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the package */,
  "save_amount" REAL /* Amount saved with the current price */,
  "price_effective_date" TEXT /* Date the price becomes effective */,
  "price_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the price expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program the customer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_per_dollar" REAL /* Number of points earned per dollar spent */,
  "points_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the points expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support ticket */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who opened the ticket */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the ticket was created */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date the ticket was resolved */,
  "support_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the support agent who resolved the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_support_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("support_agent_id") REFERENCES support_agents ("support_agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_agents" (
  "support_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support agent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the support agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the support agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the support agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_agent_id")
)
